title: rashidlab/DeSurv-paper: Reproducibility code for 'Survival-guided matrix factorization identifies reproducible prognostic programs in pancreatic cancer'
description: Reproducibility code, processed data, and pre-computed analysis results for the manuscript Survival-guided matrix factorization identifies reproducible prognostic programs in pancreatic cancer (Young, Yurovsky, Peng, Yeh, Li, Rashid). The pipeline is a numbered series of R scripts (code/01_install.R … code/09_render_paper.R) that re-render the manuscript and supplement from cached results. Depends on the DeSurv R package (separate Zenodo deposit).
